zh.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph V Bassett MP是Ralph Bassett IV的兒子，於1244年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特。他和Hawise de Gray至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1299年12月31日在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Bassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French basset ‘of low stature’, a diminutive of basse ‘low, short’, either a nickname for a short person or a status name for someone of humble origins.
Altered form of French Bessette 1 or Besset (see Bessette 2).

History: William Bassett (c. 1598–1667) came to Plymouth, MA, from Kent, England, in the 1620s; c. 1650 he moved to Duxbury and subesequently to Bridgewater. He had many prominent descendants, among them one of the earliest families on Martha's Vineyard. — The surname Bassett of French origin (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Bessette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Alphonse, Lucien, Cecile, Herve, Jacques, Laurent, Aime.

French: topographic name designating a small wood of birches, from Occitan bès ‘birch tree’ (see Besse ), or a habitational name from (La) Bessette, the name of several places in the southern part of France.
Alternatively, an altered form of French Besset: topographic name, a cognate of 1 above. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: MP
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Kam, Chi, Chu, Chun Wah, Hon, Kwai, Lai, Ping, Pui, Chan, Cheng, Chi Keung.
Chinese: alternative Cantonese form of the surname 葉, see   Ye   1.

variants.name: Ye
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Hong, Jian, Qing, Feng, Zhong, Bin, Jin, Li, Mei, Min, Ming, Wen.  Korean Chol, Dong Sup, Jong Chul, Myong, Neng, Sook Young, Sung Chul.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 葉, meaning ‘leaf’ in Chinese: (i) from the placename Ye (葉), the name of a fief (located in Henan province) granted to Shen Zhu Liang, son of an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) traced back to a minority ethnic group in ancient southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 野: shortened form of the Chinese surname Dong-Ye (東野), which was derived from name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to Yu, nephew of King Wu of Zhou (c. 1087–1043 BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph V Bassett MP was born in 1244, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Ralph Bassett IV. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Hawise de Gray. He died on 31 December 1299, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England.

Il est décédé le 31 décembre 1299, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph V Bassett MPは1244年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットでRalph Bassett IVの息子として生まれた。彼はHawise de Grayとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1299年12月31日に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph V Bassett MP(은)는 1244년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 Ralph Bassett IV의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Hawise de Gray(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1299년 12월 31일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에 묻혔다.
